layout.container: flex h-screen w-full bg-[#F8F9FA] overflow-hidden font-sans
layout.sidebar: w-[240px] flex-shrink-0 bg-[#1a1a2e] flex flex-col h-full
layout.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 px-8 pb-8

components.sidebar_nav: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 mx-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all group
components.stat_card: bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-3 relative overflow-hidden transition-transform duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1
components.table_card: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden mx-8 mb-8
components.badge_base: border px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[11px] font-bold tracking-wide uppercase inline-flex items-center

media.logo_instructions: Build the logo organically in code. Use a container with a background gradient `bg-gradient-to-tr from-cyan-400 to-lime-400`. Inside, put the `TrendingUp` icon in white or dark navy. Next to it, render the text 'Sahi Margin' in white `font-bold tracking-tight text-xl`. NO image file needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build 'Sahi Margin' as a React SPA with React Router. The Dashboard is the main page.
Use a pure HTML/Tailwind approach for layouts. Avoid using heavy UI components for simple layout wrappers.
Implement the 4 KPI stat cards with hardcoded values: Revenue (₹12,450), Profit (₹3,200), Orders (24), Alerts (3).
Build the Recent Orders table matching the specifications: Product Name, Platform, Selling Price, Net Profit, Date.
Add 6 dummy rows for Indian e-commerce products (kurta, phone case, diyas, brass lamp, wooden toy, spice box).
Use exact hex colors defined in this JSON.
Apply `data-testid` to all navigation links, stat cards, and table rows.
Set the sidebar strictly to 240px wide with background `#1a1a2e`. Active nav item gets the `#FF6B00` background.
Ensure standard E1 alignment: Dashboard numbers should be highly legible, left-aligned, and structured.
